leverage.linePrev: A mean flow, like a lunch money
leverage.line: Bully, I got leverage like a pulley
leverage.lineNext: Pull your body in the gully, then assassinate ya subtly
stanza: I'm about to inject you with the verbal slime
The vegetables of rhyme, nutrition for your mind
Poke your nerves in your spine
Emcees be all over the place with their rhymes
While mine remain defined, glued to perfection
I kiss the mic with affection
My mind is taking time for some stretchin'
Bending galaxies into my verbal collection
My ethics remain the most pristine
You don't know half the shit I've seen
Drugs, violence and money ain't my scene
That shit's obscene, failure is not in my genome
I eat rappers like amino
Acid I spit, I'm sick make you need chemo
I got the heart of a king, I'm casino
I keep my profile on the D-low
That way if I need to snap a neck, I can creep slow
I'm quiet but alert like Cappuccino
For every rhyme you have, I got a kilo
I torpedo my ego of being half Latino
With rhymes that are jalapeño
A mean flow, like a lunch money
Bully, I got leverage like a pulley
Pull your body in the gully, then assassinate ya subtly
Fire rhymes, I'll boil your blood till it's bubbly
I must boil your blood because I can't leave evidence
I can't have a conscious that is decadence
I'm perfecting the elements, so I can raise a hell-ish genesis
Inject ya membranous tissues with my sentences
Your brain is my new residence
So prepare for ideas of excellence and long nights of restlessness
I'm reckless, I'll erode your skeletal with tetanus
Spit the most venomous, leave you stranded in a nebulous
Unless you're in for my best interest
I'll show you benevolence, fly us away on a Pegasus
Let you benefit from my intelligence
My rhymes are the perception of medicine that is perfection
Known to cure cancer, bulimia and depression
That last one is a self-tested assessment

Shake it loose and let it fall

Like the shadows on the wall

All I'm takin' is your time
Help me make it through the night

life's.line: But life's full of sad songs
stanza: Well hey man, that's just a lie
It's the lie she tells her friends
'Cause a real song
The real song she won't even admit to herself
The beating in her heart
It's a song lots of people know
It's a painful song
With a load of sad truth
But life's full of sad songs
Penny for a wish
But wishin' won't make you so, Joe
But a pretty kiss or a pretty face can't have its way
Joe, tramps like us, we were born to pay

life's.linePrev: The speeding planet burns, I'm used to that
life's.line: My life's so common it disappears
stanza: For the mother's restless son
Who is a witness to, who is a warrior
Who denies his urge to break and run
Who says: hard times? I'm used to them
The speeding planet burns, I'm used to that
My life's so common it disappears
And sometimes even music
Cannot substitute for tears

life's.line: Just to show life's not made of gold

Some get by but some get old
Just to show life's not made of gold
When the night is cold

life's.linePrev: Just make sure you scream when I'm on stage
life's.line: Have everybody listening, my life's pristine
life's.lineNext: Wake up and smoke weed, say "Hello" to the team
stanza: I got bars that'll take me further than mars
I've known it from the start so I've been perfecting my art
Your part, is not much in my scheme
Just make sure you scream when I'm on stage
Have everybody listening, my life's pristine
Wake up and smoke weed, say "Hello" to the team
We just trying to get some C.R.E.A.M, Wu-Tang
Who saying that I'm playing? I'm a rap abomination
Emcee's praying that I won't slay 'em
On their own beat, on their own street
And hear their mother's weep as I leave a card by their feet
Says "I ended the blindness, sincerely the Finest", ooh-wee
I'm always kill 'em with kindness, ooh-wee, I got the lyrical heat
The inferno that burns though your journal (Mos Def)
I put my sweatshirt on so that's word to Earl
I expel pearls, I'm not talking about the necklace
I'm reckless, I'll always eat a pussy out for breakfast
I'm next bitch, so don't judge this dude
You don't know what the fuck I've been through
Too, much has been put into this
So I ain't leaving until I have a gold fucking necklace
Yes, I-I must spit to impress
Before I'm the next best to put the mic to rest
Mos Def, taught me mathematic tactics, most rap is lackin'
So I'll start the reaction of (INhale) in action
That's oxygen in action, I got L's being passed
And I can sleep when I'm dead so for now let me rap

stanza: They pulled in just behind the bridge
He lays her down, he frowns
"Gee, my life's a funny thing
Am I still too young?"
He kissed her then and there
She took his ring, took his babies
It took him minutes, took her nowhere
Heaven knows, she'd have taken anything, but

life's.linePrev: And you should have heard him trash his dad
life's.line: Life's no picnic, that's a given
life's.lineNext: My mom's mom died when my mom was seven
stanza: When I was your age I was just like you
And just look at me now, I'm sure you do
But your grandfather was just as bad
And you should have heard him trash his dad
Life's no picnic, that's a given
My mom's mom died when my mom was seven
My mom's father was a tragic guy
But he was so distant that nobody knows why
Now, your mother's family, you know them
Each and every one a gem
Each and every one a gem

lectric.lineNext: That's the colour of my room
stanza: Blue, blue, 'lectric blue
That's the colour of my room
Where I will live
Blue, blue
Pale blinds drawn all day
Nothing to read, nothing to say
Blue, blue
I will sit right down
Waiting for the gift of sound and vision
And I will sing
Waiting for the gift of sound and vision
Drifting into my solitude
Over my head

I took a little risk

Like coming through and loving you
Like coming through and loving you

lou.songTitle: The Luckiest Guy on the Lower East Side
lou.linePrev: You laugh like a little girl
lou.line: So you share secrets with Lou
stanza: So you share secrets with Lou
But we've got secrets too
Well, one
I only keep this heap for you

partner.line: But we've got secrets too

lou.linePrev: Daddy's gone; my brother's out huntin' in the mountains
lou.line: Big John's been drinkin' since the river took Emmy Lou
lou.lineNext: So the powers that be left me here to do the thinkin'
stanza: Daddy's gone; my brother's out huntin' in the mountains
Big John's been drinkin' since the river took Emmy Lou
So the powers that be left me here to do the thinkin'
And I just turned twenty-two
I was wonderin' what to do
The closer they got, the more those feelings grew

partner.line: And I just turned twenty-two

lou.linePrev: Well, my boyfriend's in a band
lou.line: He plays guitar while I sing Lou Reed
lou.lineNext: I've got feathers in my hair
stanza: Well, my boyfriend's in a band
He plays guitar while I sing Lou Reed
I've got feathers in my hair
I get down to Beat poetry
And my jazz collection's rare
I can play most anything
I'm a Brooklyn baby
I'm a Brooklyn baby

lou.line: I'd like to send this one out to Lou and Rachel
lou.lineNext: And all the kids and P.S. 192
stanza: Glory of love, ah huh huh
The glory of love
Glory of love, glory of love
Glory of love, now, glory of love, now
Glory of love, now, now, now, glory of love
Glory of love, give it to me now
Glory of love'll see you through
Oh, my Coney Island baby, now
(I'm a Coney Island baby, now)
I'd like to send this one out to Lou and Rachel
And all the kids and P.S. 192
Coney Island baby
Man, I'd swear, I'd give the whole thing up for you

lyricshalf.line: 2 ContributorsJulia LyricsHalf of what I say is meaningless
lyricshalf.lineNext: But I say it just to reach you, Julia
stanza: 2 ContributorsJulia LyricsHalf of what I say is meaningless
But I say it just to reach you, Julia
Julia, Julia
Ocean child calls me
So I sing the song of love, Julia
Julia
Seashell eyes, windy smile calls me
So I sing the song of love
Julia
Her hair of floating sky is shimmering
Glimmering in the sun
Julia, Julia
Morning moon touch me
So I sing the song of love
Julia
When I cannot sing my heart
I can only speak my mind
Julia
Julia
Sleeping sand, silent cloud touch me
So I sing the song of love
Julia
Calls me
So I sing the song of love for Julia
Julia, Julia

lyricsthat.line: 1 ContributorAnd Lovin’ You LyricsThat cold Chicago wind
stanza: 1 ContributorAnd Lovin’ You LyricsThat cold Chicago wind
Was howling down the street
The rain has turned to sleet
If I decide to go
It will commence to snow
It's overdue

lancashire.linePrev: I saw the news today, oh, boy
lancashire.lineNext: And though the holes were rather small
stanza: I saw the news today, oh, boy
Four-thousand holes in blackburn, lancashire
And though the holes were rather small
They had to count them all
Now they know how many holes it takes to fill the albert hall
Id love to turn you on

laughin.linePrev: She lifts her skirt up to her knees
laughin.line: Walks through the garden rows with her bare feet, laughin'
laughin.lineNext: I never learned to count my blessings
stanza: She lifts her skirt up to her knees
Walks through the garden rows with her bare feet, laughin'
I never learned to count my blessings
I choose instead to dwell in my disasters

laughin.linePrev: So I guess I'll have to do it while I'm here
laughin.line: And I won't be laughin' at the lies when I'm gone
laughin.lineNext: And I can't question how or when or why when I'm gone
stanza: And I won't be laughin' at the lies when I'm gone
And I can't question how or when or why when I'm gone
Can't live proud enough to die when I'm gone
So I guess I'll have to do it while I'm here

laughin.linePrev: How in the world you gonna see
laughin.lineNext: Who on earth d'you think you are?
stanza: Instant karma's gonna get you
Gonna look you right in the face
Better get yourself together, darling
Join the human race
How in the world you gonna see
Laughin' at fools like me?
Who on earth d'you think you are?
A superstar? Well, right you are

laughin.linePrev: What in the world you thinkin' of
laughin.line: Laughin' in the face of love?
laughin.lineNext: What on earth you tryin' to do?
stanza: Instant karma's gonna get you
Gonna knock you right in the head
You better get yourself together
Pretty soon, you're gonna be dead
What in the world you thinkin' of
Laughin' in the face of love?
What on earth you tryin' to do?
It's up to you, yeah, you

loretta.linePrev: We had an apartment in the city
loretta.line: Me and Loretta liked living there
loretta.lineNext: Well, it'd been years since the kids had grown
stanza: We had an apartment in the city
Me and Loretta liked living there
Well, it'd been years since the kids had grown
A life of their own left us alone
John and Linda live in Omaha
And Joe is somewhere on the road
We lost Davy in the Korean War
And I still don't know what for, don't matter anymore

loretta.linePrev: Waiting for someone to say, "Hello in there, hello"
loretta.line: Me and Loretta, we don't talk much more
loretta.lineNext: She sits and stares through the backdoor screen
stanza: Me and Loretta, we don't talk much more
She sits and stares through the backdoor screen
And all the news just repeats itself
Like some forgotten dream that we've both seen
Someday I'll go and call up Rudy
We worked together at the factory
But what could I say if he asks "What's new?"
"Nothing, what's with you? Nothing much to do"

loretta.linePrev: Loves me like I want her to
